title: Hiring Store Manager at Costa Coffee India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Costa Coffee India
jsonLd.description:
Costa Coffee India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Costa Coffee India:
Costa Coffee India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
